data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The requirement to validate the persona scenario of sharing a template across businesses lacks supporting evidence. The linked use case and prior steps do not provide any concrete data or API responses that confirm the expected behavior of the scenario. As a result, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive outcome for this exploratory step.
gaps: No evidence of scenario behavior confirmation or actionable failure report.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the scenario behavior.
